title: Choeroseris sprengeriana
intro: Choeroseris sprengeriana, also known as Sprenger's rose, is a flowering plant species native to the Mediterranean region. This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and respiratory ailments, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Choeroseris sprengeriana include flavonoids, saponins, and triterpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of colds, fever, and other respiratory infections.
